seo.title: Bagas Uwaidha
seo.ogDescription: A Full Stack Developer experienced in building web applications with Nuxt.js, Node.js, and Express.js. Focused on modern frontend development and cloud architecture.

hero.name: Bagas Tsiqoh Fiqyan Uwaidha
hero.lead: A Full Stack Developer with experience building web applications using Nuxt.js, Node.js, and Express.js. Experienced in RESTful API development, database design, JWT authentication, and application deployment on Google Cloud Platform.

stats.label: Specialization
stats.sub: Vue · Nuxt.js · TypeScript · Modern Web Architecture · Pinia

paragraphs: I am a Software Developer with an Informatics background, focused on Frontend Development. I build modern web applications that are fast, interactive, and scalable using Vue and Nuxt as my main stack.

Beyond frontend work, I also have experience in backend development and cloud architecture - from building RESTful APIs with Node.js, Express.js, and FastAPI, to deployment using Google Cloud Platform.

In several projects, I have been involved in full-stack system development: from database schema design and API development to frontend integration. I have also developed a scheduling optimization system using the Grey Wolf Optimizer algorithm - reflecting my interest in algorithm-based problem solving.

I am currently continuing to grow in frontend engineering, web performance, and scalable architecture - with the goal of building digital products that not only function well, but also deliver an excellent user experience.

projects.title: UAD Course Scheduler

projects.title: WhatsApp Nutrition Bot
projects.desc: A WhatsApp-based application that provides nutrition information from user-input food items. It helps users track their daily calorie and nutrition intake more easily.

projects.title: Find The Different
projects.desc: An interactive educational game designed for children.

projects.title: Web PHP CRUD
projects.desc: A native PHP website with CRUD features and PDF export.

projects.title: Discord Bot
projects.desc: A Discord music bot for community servers.

projects.title: View Saved Wifi
projects.desc: A simple Python script for reading saved WiFi profiles on Windows.

jobList: Designed and created the Game Design Document (GDD)

Built a headless CMS backend using Strapi for content management and API integration.
Integrated the frontend with Strapi REST APIs for dynamic data handling.
Deployed the frontend on Vercel with build and performance optimization.
Deployed and managed the backend on Railway.
Performed testing, debugging, and web performance optimization.
Developed and maintained the company's backend and frontend products.
Ensured application and user data security.
Performed debugging and technical issue resolution.
Wrote code documentation and technical guides.
